title: ApiKeySelfResponse
description: Wire response returned by GET /v1-api-key-self. Self-introspection of the API key on the request. Never includes the raw key or its hash — safe to surface in operator dashboards.

key_id.description: Server-side UUID of the api_keys row for this key.

environment.description: 'live' or 'test' (or any future environment label the server introduces).

scopes.description: Granted scopes (e.g. ['evaluate', 'audit.read']). Empty array when the key has no explicit scopes.

allowed_cidrs.description: Per-key IP allowlist as CIDR strings (e.g. ['10.0.0.0/8']). null when the key is unrestricted.

rate_limit_per_minute.description: Server-enforced per-minute rate limit for this key.

client_ip.description: Client IP as the server observed it (first hop of X-Forwarded-For). null when unresolvable.

expires_at.description: Server-stored expiry. null means the key does not auto-expire.

request_id.description: Short-lived correlation id from the server for log correlation (observability-layer, not a key field).
